overall_note: Only Rev A sheets present (104A power/data, 103A RCP); no superseded revisions. Power/data counts from 104A and lighting/mech from 103A. CONFIDENCE IS LOW on RCP fitting counts (panels, 12W downlights, diffusers) because the retail-floor ceiling grid is dense and the raster symbols are small/overlapping — panels vs diffusers vs downlights are hard to separate at this resolution; counts are best estimates and should be verified against a higher-res RCP. DGPO AB/UB/SK suffix allocation is partly inferred from labels near amenities/reception; some GPO/switch symbols in the tight amenities corridor may be undercounted. Speaker qty cross-confirmed by legend (4). Many 'power for...' items are text-noted special circuits rather than plotted symbols. Exit/emergency signs are conditional ('only if required by certifier').
